mapper.sql: select e.experiment_id, e.target_id, e.experiment_name, e.project_id, e.start_time, e.location, e.platform_config, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_time, e.content_desc,e.path, t.target_type from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e left join SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_target_info t on e.target_id = t.target_id
mapper.select:
select e.experiment_id, e.target_id, e.experiment_name, e.project_id, e.start_time, e.location, e.platform_config, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_time, e.content_desc,e.path, d.project_name, t.target_type from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e left join SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_project_info d on e.project_id = d.project_id left join SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.D_TARGET_INFO t on e.target_id = t.target_id
and e.experiment_id = #{experimentId} and e.experiment_name like concat('%', #{experimentName}, '%') and e.project_id = #{projectId} and e.create_by like concat('%', #{createBy}, '%')
AND date_format(e.create_time,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(e.create_time,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%y%m%d')
order by e.create_time desc

select e.experiment_id, e.target_id, e.experiment_name, e.project_id, e.start_time, e.location, e.platform_config, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_time, e.content_desc,e.path, d.project_name from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info e left join SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.D_PROJECT_INFO d on e.project_id = d.project_id where e.experiment_id in
#{experimentId}
mapper.insert:
insert into SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.d_experiment_info
experiment_id, target_id, experiment_name, project_id, start_time, location, platform_config, create_by, create_time, update_time, content_desc, path,
#{experimentId}, #{targetId}, #{experimentName}, #{projectId}, #{startTime}, #{location}, #{platformConfig}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{contentDesc}, #{path},
